display.purpose: Screen titles and hero numbers — once per screen.

title.purpose: Card titles, section headers, list leads.

shadows.name: sm
shadows.purpose: Default whisper-lift on cards and tiles (elevation 1).

shadows.name: md
shadows.purpose: Raised cards and the app bar (elevation 2).

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default Material easing for state transitions; honors reduced-motion by degrading to a crossfade.

motion.name: press-opacity
motion.purpose: Touchable press feedback across buttons and tappable rows.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single high-emphasis action per screen — solid identity green.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #1B5E20; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: Cairo, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; padding: 14px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), opacity 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #15501A; } .ds-btn-primary:active { opacity: 0.82; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1B5E20; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Refined-and-restrained surface: hairline border + whisper shadow, never heavy elevation.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #E0E0E0; border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); color: #212121; font-family: Cairo, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; }

components.name: Status Pill
components.description: Tinted-light background + same-hue text, always paired with a label (never color alone).
components.css: .ds-status-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: #E8F5E9; color: #1B5E20; font-family: Cairo, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 800; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px; padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; }

components.name: Icon Button
components.description: Circular 44pt-minimum control; tonal background by intent, green glyph by default.
components.html: <button class="ds-icon-btn" aria-label="تشغيل التسجيل"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="22" height="22" fill="#1B5E20"><path d="M8 5v14l11-7z"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-icon-btn { width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #E0E0E0; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: opacity 0.2s; } .ds-icon-btn:active { opacity: 0.82; } .ds-icon-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1B5E20; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Metric Tile (Achievement)
components.description: Compact stat surface; gold tone reserved for earned achievement (streaks, certificates).
components.css: .ds-metric { background: #FFF8E1; border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px; min-height: 70px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; font-family: Cairo, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-metric-value { color: #FFC107; font-weight: 700; font-size: 24px; line-height: 28px; } .ds-metric-label { color: #757575; font-size: 12px; margin-top: 3px; }

components.name: Progress Bar
components.description: Quiet workhorse of the 'visible progress' promise; primary fill by default, gold for achievement.
components.css: .ds-progress { background: #E0E0E0; height: 6px; border-radius: 3px; overflow: hidden; width: 220px; } .ds-progress-fill { width: 75%; height: 6px; border-radius: 3px; background: #1B5E20; }

components.name: Empty State
components.description: Composed 'nothing here yet' moment: primary-muted medallion, title, calm description.
components.html:
لا توجد تسجيلات بعد
ابدأ بتسجيل تلاوتك الأولى لهذا الأسبوع.
components.css: .ds-empty { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center; padding: 32px 16px; font-family: Cairo, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-empty-icon { width: 58px; height: 58px; border-radius: 20px; background: #E8F5E9; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-empty-title { color: #212121; font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; } .ds-empty-desc { color: #757575; font-size: 14px; margin-top: 4px; }

narrative.overview: A page of a Quranic manuscript is dignified before it is decorated: deep, calm ground; disciplined text; and gold reserved for what is worth illuminating. The surface is quiet and breathable, the green is grounded and reverent, and the amber-gold is the light of earned progress — it appears on the completed surah, the maintained streak, the granted certificate, and almost nowhere else. The system is themeable (four identities × light/dark) and size-adjustable via a per-user font and spacing scale, never breaking layout. It rejects the cold grey of corporate SaaS, the cartoon bounce of toy-like gamification, and the dense clutter of an institutional portal.
keyCharacteristics: Reverent green ground; gold rationed to genuine achievement.
Arabic-first: Cairo throughout, RTL writing direction baked into the text primitive.
Refined and restrained surfaces — hairline borders, soft shadows, real breathing room.
Themeable (4 identities × light/dark) and size-adjustable without layout breakage.
Material-derived color, type, elevation, and 8pt-grid spacing.

rules.name: The Rationed Gold Rule
rules.body: Gold marks earned achievement and nothing else. Forbidden as a decorative accent, background, divider, or 'make it pop' highlight. Its rarity is what makes illumination mean something.

rules.name: The Status-Is-Not-Only-Color Rule
rules.body: Grade, attendance, appointment, and recording status must always pair color with an icon or label. Color alone is prohibited.

rules.name: The Cairo-Everywhere Rule
rules.body: Cairo is the only UI family; do not introduce a second sans for Latin. A dedicated Quran/Amiri face for ayah display is the one sanctioned future exception.

rules.name: The Honor-the-Scale Rule
rules.body: Every text size flows through the user's font-size scale via the AppText primitive. Hard-coded font sizes that bypass the scale are prohibited.

rules.name: The Whisper-Lift Rule
rules.body: Resting cards use sm shadow and a hairline border, never more. Heavier shadow is a response to genuine layering, not a way to make a card stand out.

dos: Do ration gold to earned achievement — streaks, completed surahs, certificates. Identity green carries everything else.
Do route every text size and spacing value through AppText / the settings scales, so the elder-friendly large-text contract holds.
Do pair every status with an icon or label, never color alone (color-blind safety).
Do keep one primary action per screen; let surfaces breathe (16px+ card padding, real whitespace).
Do design RTL-first — logical layout and direction-aware icons; Arabic is the tested default.
Do verify ≥4.5:1 body contrast across all four themes and dark mode before shipping a screen.
Do degrade celebratory motion to a calm crossfade under reduced-motion.
donts: Don't make it feel like corporate / sterile SaaS — no cold dashboard-grey enterprise UI with no warmth.
Don't make it childish / toy-like — no cartoon mascots, bouncy/elastic motion, or sticker-sheet badges.
Don't make it cluttered / institutional — no government-portal screens that dump every field at once.
Don't use gold as decoration, a background, or a generic highlight. If nothing was earned, no gold.
Don't add purple-to-blue (or any multi-hue) gradients; the brand is solid primary.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism, custom glows, or neumorphism.
Don't use a colored side-stripe (border-left/right > 1px) as a card or alert accent.
Don't introduce a second UI font for Latin; Cairo covers both scripts.
